narrative:
Chillicothe City has 13,954 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.4 percentage points.
